creator: kris@pcbsd.org
text:
I'm trying to do some port builds which depend upon talloc, and it seems to be always hanging during the configure phase:

----------------------------------------------------------------

===>   samba34-libsmbclient-3.4.14 depends on shared library: talloc.2 - not fo
und
===>    Verifying install for talloc.2 in /usr/ports/devel/talloc
===>  License GPLv3 accepted by the user
===>  Extracting for talloc-2.0.5
=> SHA256 Checksum OK for talloc-2.0.5.tar.gz.
===>  Patching for talloc-2.0.5
===>  Applying FreeBSD patches for talloc-2.0.5
===>   talloc-2.0.5 depends on file: /usr/pbi/xbmc-amd64/bin/python2.7 - found
===>   talloc-2.0.5 depends on executable: pkg-config - found
===>  Configuring for talloc-2.0.5
Checking for program gcc or cc           : cc 
Checking for program ar                  : /usr/bin/ar
Checking for program ranlib              : /usr/bin/ranlib
Checking for gcc                         : ok
Checking for program git                 : not found
Check for -MD                            : 

--------------------------------------------------------------------
That's as far as it gets, it'll pretty much hang here forever.

How-To-Repeat: Build devel/talloc on 9.0-BETA2-amd64
